overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player riding an elevator through a dark, industrial facility, then exploring dimly lit corridors and discovering a seated figure near a vending machine. The environment features concrete walls, graffiti, and neon lighting accents typical of a dystopian or horror game setting.

events.description: elevator doors close after floor selection
elevator doors open revealing the corridor outside

agents.ego_description: selecting a floor on the elevator control panel, waiting as the elevator moves, then preparing to exit

entered.detail: digital interface with yellow text displaying floor options including NO SECURITY and ENTRANCE
white spray-painted text reading MERCY on corrugated metal wall
metal sliding doors with decorative floral patterns at the top

segments.scene_description: The player stands inside an industrial elevator, interacting with a digital control panel to select a floor. The walls feature graffiti reading MERCY. The elevator doors close, remain shut for several seconds, then open to reveal a dimly lit corridor outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned facility corridor with storage cabinets and wire mesh doors

events.description: exits elevator into dimly lit concrete corridor

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through dark corridors, passing metal storage cabinets and observing blood stains on the floor

entered.detail: beige metal cabinets with dark handles lining the corridor walls
security door with wire mesh panel and red light strip at the bottom
dark red stains on the concrete floor near the elevator exit

segments.scene_description: The player exits the elevator into a narrow, dimly lit corridor with concrete floors and industrial metal cabinets. Blood stains are visible on the floor near the elevator. The camera moves forward past wire mesh security doors and wooden crates, heading deeper into the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corner with vending machine and seated figure

events.description: discovers a seated figure slumped in the dark corner near red laser beams
approaches an illuminated vending machine displaying food items

agents.ego_description: approaching a seated figure in the darkness, then examining a brightly lit vending machine with various food items displayed

notable_agents.action: seated figure slumped against wall in dark corner, surrounded by steam or smoke, appearing injured or deceased

entered.detail: illuminated machine displaying food items with prices in a foreign currency, glowing with white and red light
large poster showing multiple faces with red markings and price tags
vertical red laser beams visible in the darkness behind the seated figure

segments.scene_description: The player enters a darker section of the corridor and discovers a seated figure slumped against the wall near vertical red laser beams. Approaching closer, the player examines a brightly lit vending machine displaying food items with prices, while the figure remains motionless on the floor nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as it moves from the enclosed space of an industrial elevator into the depths of a grim, dimly lit facility. It begins inside the elevator where the camera interacts with a digital control panel against graffiti-covered walls before the doors slide shut and then reopen to reveal a narrow corridor. As the camera exits the lift, it glides over blood-stained concrete floors and past industrial metal cabinets, moving deeper into the facility through a gauntlet of wire mesh security doors and wooden crates. The scene then shifts into a darker section of the hallway where the lighting becomes more oppressive, punctuated by vertical red laser beams. Finally, the camera approaches a motionless figure slumped against the wall, coming to a halt before a brightly lit vending machine displaying food items.
